texto: I feel both isolated from poverty – I do not know what my neighbors need or if they need anything – and surrounded by it because now we know all about the hunger and death in the world, and everyone is my neighbor.
explicacao: Citação de Lori Smith sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I feel both isolated from poverty – I do not know what my neighbors need or if they need anything…” articula reflexao, poverty, isolated em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
